summary: W872 keeps the target nonterminal under the immutable original four-task contract while composing W853 homology-free selected-cochain branch reconstruction with the W870 stable-ExactAt route. From one homology-free W853 selected-cochain route-data provider, W872 checks direct bounded left calculus and obtains the bounded derived infinity-category package through W853, W831, and W869/W870. Product success remains false because a concrete homology-free provider, the final original-four-task witness, and the completion review packet are still incomplete.
known_gaps: Task 4 is not contract-complete under the original four-task contract: W872 moves the latest stable ExactAt boundary to one homology-free W853 selected-cochain route-data provider, but that provider is still not concretely instantiated.

Concrete W853 homology-free selected-cochain route-data provider fields are not yet fully instantiated; the latest route boundary is one provider carrying boundary/relation, target closedness, normalized target, source triangulation, endpoint topology, and localized right-adjoint data.
The final Dbounded MetrizableLCA original four-task completion witness is still missing; ProductSuccessDeclarations and OriginalFourTaskCompletionDeclarations only record nonterminal route evidence.
The completion review packet still lacks the immutable-contract negative-fixture coverage, external SHA256 sidecar, and clean extraction audit required for product success.
remaining_work: Construct or precisely block one concrete W853 homology-free selected-cochain route-data provider now isolated by W872.
Connect the resulting route to a no-argument or fully instance-resolved original four-task completion witness only after all route inputs are real.
Refresh the completion review packet, negative fixtures, manifest, clean extraction audit, and terminal outcome only after the original witness exists.
